findings.title: Live preview unlock bypasses evidence gate
findings.description: MITIGATED (Phase 1): materializationProofReady bypass removed. Orchestrator, canonical state, and client now use resolveAuthoritativePreviewUrls / livePreviewAvailable only when gate returns PREVIEW_UNLOCKED + UNLOCKED_PREVIEW_READY. Dev server URL exposed as diagnosticPreviewUrl when locked.
findings.violates: AEP-6 Evidence-Driven Launch — preview must not unlock on dev-server alone
findings.recommendedFix: DONE Phase 1 — validate:aep-preview-gate-authority enforces gate-only unlock.

findings.title: ASE registry declares simulationOnly
findings.description: MITIGATED (Phase 2): ASE registry sets simulationOnly: false and enforcementEngine: true. src/ase-enforcement-engine/ is the authoritative engineering decision layer with runAutonomousEngineering, requestEngineeringAction, and validate:ase-enforcement-engine.
findings.violates: AEP-2 Autonomous Recovery — core engineering authority is simulated not executed
findings.recommendedFix: DONE Phase 2 — ASE Enforcement Engine V1 with ASE_ENFORCEMENT_ENGINE_V1_PASS.

findings.title: ASE pipeline results ignored before materialization
findings.description: MITIGATED (Phase 2): one-prompt orchestrator routes materialization through runAutonomousEngineering host callback only after ASE authorization. materializationAuthorized and materializationExecuted gates abort build when ASE denies or materialization fails.
findings.violates: AEP-2 Autonomous Recovery — failures are collected but not acted on before generation
findings.recommendedFix: DONE Phase 2 — orchestrator thin host; ASE owns pre/post materialization engineering.

findings.title: resumeExistingProject flag accepted but not honored
findings.description: OnePromptBuildInput exposes resumeExistingProject but orchestrator always creates/runs full materialization path without reading resume intent or skipping duplicate workspace creation.
findings.violates: AEP-1 One-Prompt Continuity — resume requires re-prompting or manual UI instead of autonomous continuation
findings.recommendedFix: Implement resume branch: load stored prompt, workspace snapshot, lastSuccessfulStage; continue from failure stage without new projectId.

findings.title: Brain API projectResume payload not rendered in chat UI
findings.description: brain-api-handler returns projectResume on duplicate detection but app.js askBrain path does not render resume/continue actions from projectResume — only appendChatAlignmentActions for context alignment.
findings.violates: AEP-1 One-Prompt Continuity — duplicate/resume routing stops at API; user must discover manual buttons elsewhere
findings.recommendedFix: Render autonomous resume card in chat from projectResume with one-click continue using stored prompt; hide confirmProjectResume when safe auto-resume applies.

findings.title: Autonomous debugging and auto-fix are simulation-only
findings.description: auto-fix-runtime, testing-runtime, and ASE autonomousDebugging artifacts declare simulationOnly. Failures do not trigger automatic patch application or verified retry loops.
findings.violates: AEP-2 Autonomous Recovery — system reports fixes but user must debug manually
findings.recommendedFix: Connect fix proposals to controlled apply runtime with rollback; retry failed npm build/dev-server stages automatically up to policy limit.

findings.title: Launch readiness authority is simulation-only
findings.description: launch-readiness-registry and launch-readiness-authority-v2 expose simulationOnly: true. Launch verdict does not block preview or product completion in live orchestrator path.
findings.violates: AEP-6 Evidence-Driven Launch — launch readiness is advisory not authoritative
findings.recommendedFix: Wire launch readiness PASS/FAIL into preview unlock and founder-facing launch button; defer simulation flag after real evidence chain exists.

findings.title: Preview unlock accepts partial product state
findings.description: Combined with gate bypass, apps with scaffold modules, WARN-level faithfulness, and incomplete feature contracts can reach live preview. Server and client both optimistically set validationReady/interactivity/availability to passed when a preview URL exists, masking incomplete products.
findings.violates: AEP-4 Full Product Completion — user sees runnable shell not launch-ready app
findings.recommendedFix: Tie preview to feature contract reality score + faithfulness PASS + interaction proof minimum; auto-continue build when NEEDS_WORK.

findings.title: Duplicate project detection blocks with manual confirmProjectResume
findings.description: build-from-prompt-handler and brain-api-handler set shouldBlock when duplicate slug exists unless user sends confirmProjectResume: true — forcing explicit confirmation instead of autonomous resume.
findings.violates: AEP-1 One-Prompt Continuity — user must confirm technical resume decision
findings.recommendedFix: Auto-resume incomplete duplicates with stored prompt; only block when truly unsafe (conflicting active build). Surface plain-language status not confirm flag.

findings.title: Manual Resume/Repair/Continue buttons in founder UI
findings.description: app.js renders Resume, Repair, Continue, Start Fresh buttons on incomplete project banners — shifting recovery orchestration to user as operator.
findings.violates: AEP-2 Autonomous Recovery — user chooses recovery path instead of engine auto-repair
findings.recommendedFix: Auto-trigger resumeProjectBuild on duplicate/incomplete detection; collapse manual buttons into optional Advanced with default autonomous path.

findings.title: Execution trace panel is primary founder UX surface
findings.description: Full execution trace timeline, stage IDs, and engineering events are prominently visible in normal product creation flow rather than plain-language progress.
findings.violates: AEP-3 User Is Not Debugger — user inspects engineering trace to understand progress
findings.recommendedFix: Default to product-language status card; move execution trace to collapsible Diagnostics for support mode only.

findings.title: Workspace paths and registry IDs on project cards
findings.description: Project cards and status surfaces expose workspaceRel paths, buildState engineering enums, and internal registry identifiers as primary identity.
findings.violates: AEP-8 Internal Complexity Hidden — user sees filesystem/registry not product
findings.recommendedFix: Show product name, completion %, and next autonomous action; hide paths behind Diagnostics.

findings.title: canProceedToStage imported but never enforced in ASE orchestrator
findings.description: ase-stage-orchestrator imports canProceedToStage from ase-gate-controller but never calls it — stage pipeline always completes decoratively.
findings.violates: AEP-6 Evidence-Driven Launch — gates exist in code but not in runtime control flow
findings.recommendedFix: Call canProceedToStage before each stage; abort pipeline and enqueue repair when false.

findings.title: Resume without stored prompt returns 400 storedPromptRequired
findings.description: build-from-prompt-handler requires user to paste prompt again when stored prompt missing on resume — breaking one-prompt continuity after failure or session loss.
findings.violates: AEP-1 One-Prompt Continuity — original prompt not durably persisted and recoverable
findings.recommendedFix: Persist prompt in project.json/.aidev on first build; never require re-paste for same projectId.

findings.title: Project context alignment blocks user with switch/create choices
findings.description: project-context-alignment-assessor returns actions requiring user to switch project, create new, or confirm — before autonomous routing resolves intent.
findings.violates: AEP-10 Safe Human Review Boundary — human decision requested before autonomous safe routing
findings.recommendedFix: Auto-route to active project when confidence high; only escalate alignment when ambiguous AND action is irreversible.

findings.title: UI tells user to restart npm run dev and kill port 4321
findings.description: Founder-facing notifications and chat messages instruct user to stop processes and restart dev server — operator work outside product promise.
findings.violates: AEP-3 User Is Not Debugger — user acts as runtime operator
findings.recommendedFix: Detect stale server internally; auto-restart dev server or surface single AiDevEngine action that triggers server recovery API.

findings.title: Engineering buildState badges exposed to founder
findings.description: NEEDS_WORK, REPAIRABLE, PARTIAL, ABORTED shown as raw enums on project cards without plain-language product status or autonomous next step.
findings.violates: AEP-7 Automatic State Clarity — ambiguous engineering states become user-facing
findings.recommendedFix: Map buildState to product states (Building, Fixing, Ready to preview) with autonomous action in progress indicator.

findings.title: Prompt faithfulness missing modules can WARN instead of FAIL
findings.description: prompt-faithfulness-validator downgrades missing explicit modules to WARN when explicitModulesProvided — allowing generation to proceed with gaps.
findings.violates: AEP-4 Full Product Completion — partial module set accepted
findings.recommendedFix: FAIL when explicit prompt modules missing; trigger auto-completion loop before materialization PASS.

findings.title: PBM guard passes if any single module approved
findings.description: prompt-bounded-module-resolver sets passedPreGenerationGuard true when at least one module survives guard — not when full prompt-bounded set is satisfied.
findings.violates: AEP-5 Prompt-Bounded Engineering — partial prompt coverage treated as pass
findings.recommendedFix: Require all prompt-evidenced modules approved OR documented explicit deferral with auto-completion task.

findings.title: Resume and repair send same API payload
findings.description: resumeProjectBuild sends resumeAction but orchestrator and handlers do not differentiate repair vs continue vs resume — same build endpoint restarts full path.
findings.violates: AEP-2 Autonomous Recovery — repair semantics illusory; user clicks repair with no distinct behavior
findings.recommendedFix: Implement repair path: diagnose last failure stage, apply auto-fix, resume from stage not from PLANNING.

findings.title: Project Files panel encourages manual workspace inspection
findings.description: Founder UI exposes project file tree and source paths as normal navigation path for understanding build output.
findings.violates: AEP-8 Internal Complexity Hidden — user behaves like developer reviewing repo
findings.recommendedFix: Hide file tree by default; show product preview and feature checklist instead.

findings.title: Live preview gate registry marked simulationOnly
findings.description: live-preview-gate-registry declares simulationOnly: true — gate evaluation not registered as production authority despite orchestrator integration.
findings.violates: AEP-6 Evidence-Driven Launch — preview gate lacks production authority status
findings.recommendedFix: Remove simulationOnly after evidence chain validated; add validator that gate registry is production mode in orchestrator path.

findings.title: Project registry supports archive not autonomous delete/rebuild
findings.description: project-registry-v1-store archives projects but lacks autonomous rebuild-from-scratch flow that preserves prompt and replaces contaminated workspace.
findings.violates: AEP-7 Automatic State Clarity — user cannot get clean relaunch without manual project management
findings.recommendedFix: Add rebuildProjectAutonomously(projectId) using stored prompt and snapshot rollback.

findings.title: Demo portfolio fallback on API failure
findings.description: CLIENT_DEMO_PORTFOLIO_FALLBACK injects fabricated portfolio insights when project insights API fails — masking real project state.
findings.violates: AEP-7 Automatic State Clarity — false ready/demo state on errors
findings.recommendedFix: Show explicit unavailable state with autonomous retry; never substitute demo portfolio in production founder path.

findings.title: start-fresh-copy creates duplicate instead of continuation
findings.description: resumeProjectBuild start-fresh-copy action creates new project copy rather than in-place autonomous rebuild — proliferates duplicates.
findings.violates: AEP-1 One-Prompt Continuity — duplicate projects instead of single continuing identity
findings.recommendedFix: Rebuild in place with new buildId under same projectId; retire copy semantics from default UX.

findings.title: Auto-fix proposals never applied automatically
findings.description: fix-proposal-builder and fix-verification-plan emit simulationOnly proposals; orchestrator does not apply fixes before returning failure to UI.
findings.violates: AEP-9 Autonomous Quality Improvement — friction detected but not auto-remediated
findings.recommendedFix: Apply low-risk fixes automatically; re-run failing stage; escalate to human only after retry budget exhausted.

findings.title: Testing runtime advisory only
findings.description: testing-runtime and test-plan-builder declare simulation only with no test execution before launch — quality gaps pass silently.
findings.violates: AEP-9 Autonomous Quality Improvement — tests planned not run pre-launch
findings.recommendedFix: Execute smoke tests against generated app in CI-like loop inside orchestrator; block preview on critical test fail.

findings.title: Blueprint placeholder modules in generated apps
findings.description: Generated apps include analytics-placeholders, data-management-placeholders, and demo-data modules that signal scaffold not finished product behavior.
findings.violates: AEP-4 Full Product Completion — placeholder files ship in user-facing apps
findings.recommendedFix: Replace placeholders during materialization with real feature implementations or strip from launch bundle.

findings.title: Residual profile fallback leakage risk
findings.description: Despite PBM guard, profile-derived module candidates can still enter when prompt evidence is thin — generic modules may appear in custom apps.
findings.violates: AEP-5 Prompt-Bounded Engineering — template defaults may still contaminate custom prompts
findings.recommendedFix: Hard deny list for generic modules unless prompt token match score exceeds threshold.

findings.title: Stale launch evidence may satisfy gates
findings.description: Authority modules cache evidence with process-local or time-keyed snapshots; orchestrator may accept prior PASS without re-validation after prompt change.
findings.violates: AEP-6 Evidence-Driven Launch — stale evidence accepted
findings.recommendedFix: Bind evidence to buildId + prompt hash; invalidate on any prompt or module plan change.

findings.title: Raw validator pass tokens in notifications
findings.description: Build notifications and status toasts sometimes surface internal validator tokens and stage IDs instead of plain-language outcomes.
findings.violates: AEP-3 User Is Not Debugger — internal validation vocabulary exposed
findings.recommendedFix: Map all status messages through product-language translator layer before UI render.

findings.title: Registry hydration race causes card flicker
findings.description: Despite startup hydration improvements, client still polls and re-renders project list during RESTORING — brief empty/error flashes possible on slow disks.
findings.violates: AEP-7 Automatic State Clarity — unstable project list during boot
findings.recommendedFix: Hold UI in restoring shell until server reports READY; debounce list render.

findings.title: Execution trace uses engineering stage vocabulary
findings.description: Trace events expose MATERIALIZATION, PREVIEW, ASE stage names — not user intent language like adding features or fixing issues.
findings.violates: AEP-8 Internal Complexity Hidden — engineering ontology in default UX
findings.recommendedFix: Dual-layer events: internal trace + userProgressLabel on every emission.

findings.title: No autonomous retry loop on npm build failure
findings.description: When npm run build fails in orchestrator, failure registers but automatic dependency install, config repair, and retry are not attempted before user notification.
findings.violates: AEP-2 Autonomous Recovery — single-attempt build then fail
findings.recommendedFix: Wrap npm build in retry policy with auto-fix for common errors (missing deps, tsconfig).

findings.title: Unsafe domains not blocked at generation time
findings.description: Medical, payment, and high-risk capability prompts are not consistently blocked or flagged before materialization — human review boundary unclear.
findings.violates: AEP-10 Safe Human Review Boundary — unsafe scopes may generate silently
findings.recommendedFix: Add risk classifier pre-build; block or require explicit human review with plain reason.

findings.title: NEEDS_WORK projects lack autonomous completion plan
findings.description: Projects marked NEEDS_WORK expose status but orchestrator does not enqueue automatic completion tasks to reach launch-ready.
findings.violates: AEP-4 Full Product Completion — terminal-ish state without auto-continue
findings.recommendedFix: On NEEDS_WORK, generate completion plan and auto-run until PASS or evidence-based blocker.

findings.title: Descriptor phrases may still become feature folder names
findings.description: descriptor-classification-engine reduces but does not eliminate phrase-to-folder drift where prompt adjectives become module slugs.
findings.violates: AEP-5 Prompt-Bounded Engineering — linguistic noise becomes architecture
findings.recommendedFix: Reject module slugs that fail product noun classifier; merge into nearest evidenced feature.

findings.title: Inconsistent resumable flag across API surfaces
findings.description: project-registry-handler, build handler, and brain API compute resumable differently — cards may show resumable while build endpoint rejects.
findings.violates: AEP-7 Automatic State Clarity — contradictory resume signals
findings.recommendedFix: Single deriveProjectBuildState authority consumed by all handlers and UI.

findings.title: Developer-oriented controls visible in founder command center
findings.description: UVL triggers, validation script names, and build manifest links appear in normal command center navigation.
findings.violates: AEP-8 Internal Complexity Hidden — validator culture exposed to product user
findings.recommendedFix: Move UVL/validation controls to operator mode behind feature flag.

findings.title: UVL outcomes labeled simulation only
findings.description: runtime-verification-layer returns simulation-only outcomes — accessibility and performance warnings not prioritized into auto-fix queue.
findings.violates: AEP-9 Autonomous Quality Improvement — a11y/perf friction not auto-hardened
findings.recommendedFix: Promote UVL blocking findings to continuous improvement pipeline with mandatory fix attempts.

findings.title: Continuous improvement artifacts not applied pre-launch
findings.description: ASE continuousImprovement stage produces recommendations but orchestrator does not apply improvements before preview unlock.
findings.violates: AEP-9 Autonomous Quality Improvement — improvement pass is report-only
findings.recommendedFix: Run improvement applicator loop before preview; measure delta in quality score.

findings.title: Build history does not restore prompt continuity automatically
findings.description: build-history-links.json tracks builds but failed build recovery does not auto-select last prompt/build plan for continuation.
findings.violates: AEP-1 One-Prompt Continuity — history is audit not resume authority
findings.recommendedFix: Use latest build history entry as default resume context without user selection.

findings.title: Noisy notifications on build routing miss
findings.description: Multiple stacked notifications when chat build routing fails add alert fatigue without clear single next action from AiDevEngine.
findings.violates: AEP-3 User Is Not Debugger — alert noise without autonomous action
findings.recommendedFix: Collapse to one notification with in-progress server recovery status.

findings.title: Active/inactive project labels ambiguous
findings.description: Project list mixes archived, inactive, and restoring labels without unified lifecycle terminal states.
findings.violates: AEP-7 Automatic State Clarity — minor lifecycle ambiguity
findings.recommendedFix: Define terminal states enum shared UI/server with tooltips in product language.

findings.title: AIDEVENGINE_REGISTRY_ROOT referenced in error messages
findings.description: Server misconfiguration errors may expose registry root env var name to founder UI via raw error propagation.
findings.violates: AEP-8 Internal Complexity Hidden — env config vocabulary in user errors
findings.recommendedFix: Sanitize errors at API boundary; log technical detail server-side only.

findings.title: confirmProjectResume flag is operator-facing API contract
findings.description: Public build API requires boolean confirmProjectResume — leaky abstraction of internal resume routing.
findings.violates: AEP-1 One-Prompt Continuity — API shape requires user understand resume mechanics
findings.recommendedFix: Replace with intent-neutral continueBuild: true on same projectId; server decides resume vs fresh.

findings.title: Universal blueprint pages ship for all apps
findings.description: About, Legal, Feedback blueprint pages materialize even when prompt does not request them — minor scope creep.
findings.violates: AEP-4 Full Product Completion — extra scaffold pages dilute focus
findings.recommendedFix: Materialize blueprint shell pages only when prompt or contract requires.

findings.title: Build history not linked to launch gate evidence
findings.description: build-history-links.json records builds separately from launch readiness evidence chain — audit gap for launch decisions.
findings.violates: AEP-6 Evidence-Driven Launch — history disconnected from gate proof
findings.recommendedFix: Embed gate evidence snapshot id in each build history entry.

findings.title: Human review reasons not plain language
findings.description: When founder test or alignment gates defer to human review, reasons cite internal engine names not user-understandable blockers.
findings.violates: AEP-10 Safe Human Review Boundary — correct boundary but unclear why
findings.recommendedFix: Human review card must state product risk in plain language and what AiDevEngine will try next autonomously.

findings.title: Project memory not surfaced as product continuity
findings.description: Shared memory and project knowledge layers exist but founder UI does not show what AiDevEngine remembers across builds — feels like amnesia between sessions.
findings.violates: AEP-7 Automatic State Clarity — memory exists internally not in product narrative
findings.recommendedFix: Show continuity chip: remembered goals, last fix, next step from project memory.
